mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 技术___是推动数字经济发展的核心动力。

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: trend, tendency
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 数字化已经成为全球经济发展的重要___。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 数字化已经成为全球经济发展的重要___。
mini_exercises.question_english: Digitalization has become an important trend in global economic development.

key_sentences.chinese: 微信不仅改变了人们的沟通方式，而且深刻影响了商业模式。
key_sentences.pinyin: Wēi xìn bù jǐn gǎi biàn le rén men de gōu tōng fāng shì, ér qiě shēn kè yǐng xiǎng le shāng yè mó shì.
key_sentences.english: WeChat has not only changed the way people communicate, but also profoundly influenced business models.

key_sentences.chinese: 由于技术的快速发展，数字经济已经渗透到生活的各个角落。
key_sentences.pinyin: Yóu yú jì shù de kuài sù fā zhǎn, shù zì jīng jì yǐ jīng shèn tòu dào shēng huó de gè gè jiǎo luò.
key_sentences.english: Due to the rapid development of technology, the digital economy has permeated every corner of life.

key_sentences.chinese: 究竟是技术塑造了文化，还是文化推动了技术？这是一个值得思考的问题。
key_sentences.pinyin: Jiū jìng shì jì shù sù zào le wén huà, hái shì wén huà tuī dòng le jì shù? Zhè shì yī gè zhí de sī kǎo de wèn tí.
key_sentences.english: Is it exactly technology that shapes culture, or culture that drives technology? This is a question worth pondering.

key_sentences.chinese: 这个平台不仅提供了便利的支付功能，而且创造了全新的商业生态。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhè gè píng tái bù jǐn tí gōng le biàn lì de zhī fù gōng néng, ér qiě chuàng zào le quán xīn de shāng yè shēng tài.
key_sentences.english: This platform not only provides a convenient payment function, but also creates a brand-new business ecosystem.

key_sentences.chinese: 由于海外用户的增加，中文内容的国际传播变得越来越重要。
key_sentences.pinyin: Yóu yú hǎi wài yòng hù de zēng jiā, zhōng wén nèi róng de guó jì chuán bō biàn de yuè lái yuè zhòng yào.
key_sentences.english: Due to the increase in overseas users, the international dissemination of Chinese content has become increasingly important.

key_sentences.chinese: 究竟哪种商业模式更适合全球推广，各方还在积极探索中。
key_sentences.pinyin: Jiū jìng nǎ zhǒng shāng yè mó shì gèng shì hé quán qiú tuī guǎng, gè fāng hái zài jī jí tàn suǒ zhōng.
key_sentences.english: Exactly which business model is more suitable for global promotion is still being actively explored by all parties.

grammar_points.explanation: Used to connect two parallel ideas where the second extends or intensifies the first. Structure: Subject + 不仅 + [first point]，而且 + [additional/stronger point]. 不仅 introduces the first point; 而且 introduces the additional, often more significant point.

examples.chinese: 她不仅会说中文，而且能写一手漂亮的汉字。
examples.pinyin: Tā bù jǐn huì shuō zhōng wén，ér qiě néng xiě yī shǒu piào liang de hàn zì.
examples.english: She can not only speak Chinese, but also write beautiful Chinese characters.

examples.chinese: 这款应用不仅操作简单，而且功能十分强大。
examples.pinyin: Zhè kuǎn yìng yòng bù jǐn cāo zuò jiǎn dān，ér qiě gōng néng shí fēn qiáng dà.
examples.english: This app is not only simple to operate, but also has extremely powerful functions.

exercises.question: 选择正确的搭配：这次活动___吸引了本地居民，___还吸引了很多外国游客。
Which sentence uses 不仅…而且 correctly?
choices: 他不仅去了北京，而且还去了上海。
不仅他去了北京，而且他没有去上海。
他不仅学习，而且他很累。
不仅因为他累，而且他不想去。

exercises.question: Complete: 微信___改变了通讯方式，___影响了人们的购物习惯。
不仅…而且 is best used when:
choices: Adding a further positive point to a previous one
Showing a condition and its result

exercises.question: Which is the most natural sentence?
choices: 她不仅聪明，而且非常努力。
她不仅聪明，而且她很懒。
她不仅很努力，而且她不聪明。
她不仅不聪明，而且非常努力。

mini_exercises.question: 不仅…而且… is used to...
mini_exercises.correct: Connect two parallel clauses where the second extends or intensifies the first — 'not only…but also…'
options: Connect two parallel clauses where the second extends or intensifies the first — 'not only…but also…'
Present an unexpected contrast: even though A is true, B is still the case
Give a reason or cause for the result that follows
Indicate that only one specific condition matters

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: This app not only provides communication functions, but also supports online payment.
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 这款软件___提供了通讯功能，而且支持在线支付。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 这款软件___提供了通讯功能，而且支持在线支付。
mini_exercises.question_english: This app not only provides communication functions, but also supports online payment.

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 不仅…而且?
mini_exercises.correct: 微信不仅改变了通讯方式，而且重塑了商业模式。
options: 微信不仅改变了通讯方式，而且重塑了商业模式。
微信改变了通讯方式不仅，而且重塑了商业模式。
不仅微信，而且改变了通讯方式，重塑了商业模式。
微信不仅改变了通讯方式，重塑了商业而且模式。
option_pinyin: wēi xìn bù jǐn gǎi biàn le tōng xùn fāng shì ér qiě chóng sù le shāng yè mó shì
wēi xìn gǎi biàn le tōng xùn fāng shì bù jǐn ér qiě chóng sù le shāng yè mó shì
bù jǐn wēi xìn ér qiě gǎi biàn le tōng xùn fāng shì chóng sù le shāng yè mó shì
wēi xìn bù jǐn gǎi biàn le tōng xùn fāng shì chóng sù le shāng yè ér qiě mó shì

grammar_points.meaning: Due to, owing to, because of
grammar_points.explanation: 由于 introduces a reason or cause, similar to 因为 but slightly more formal. Structure: 由于 + [reason]，[result clause]. It often appears at the beginning of a clause or sentence. Unlike 因为…所以, 由于 usually does not pair with 所以 in formal writing.

examples.chinese: 由于天气原因，比赛被推迟了。
examples.pinyin: Yóu yú tiān qì yuán yīn，bǐ sài bèi tuī chí le.
examples.english: Due to weather conditions, the match was postponed.

examples.chinese: 由于缺乏资金，这个项目无法继续进行。
examples.pinyin: Yóu yú quē fá zī jīn，zhè ge xiàng mù wú fǎ jì xù jìn xíng.
examples.english: Due to a lack of funding, this project cannot continue.

exercises.question: Choose the best completion: ___语言障碍，很多海外用户很难完全融入当地社会。
Which sentence uses 由于 correctly?
choices: 由于技术的进步，生活变得更加便利了。
由于他很聪明，但是考试没过。
由于去北京，他很开心所以。

exercises.question: 由于 is closest in meaning to:
Fill in: ___移动支付的普及，现金使用越来越少。
In formal writing, 由于 is typically followed by:

mini_exercises.question: 由于 introduces...
mini_exercises.correct: A cause or reason — 'due to' or 'because of'; more formal than 因为 and often appears at the start of the sentence
options: A cause or reason — 'due to' or 'because of'; more formal than 因为 and often appears at the start of the sentence
A result that follows naturally from the previous action
An unexpected contrast with the previous statement
A hypothetical condition that has not yet occurred

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: Due to the rapid development of the digital economy, China's electronic payment has gone global.
mini_exercises.question_chinese: ___数字经济的快速发展，中国的电子支付已走向全球。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: ___数字经济的快速发展，中国的电子支付已走向全球。
mini_exercises.question_english: Due to the rapid development of the digital economy, China's electronic payment has gone global.

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 由于?
mini_exercises.correct: 由于网络覆盖不断扩大，偏远地区也能使用移动支付了。
options: 由于网络覆盖不断扩大，偏远地区也能使用移动支付了。
网络覆盖由于不断扩大，偏远地区也能使用移动支付了。
偏远地区由于也能使用移动支付了，网络覆盖不断扩大。
由于偏远地区也能使用移动支付了，网络覆盖不断扩大。
option_pinyin: yóu yú wǎng luò fù gài bù duàn kuò dà piān yuǎn dì qū yě néng shǐ yòng yí dòng zhī fù le
wǎng luò fù gài yóu yú bù duàn kuò dà piān yuǎn dì qū yě néng shǐ yòng yí dòng zhī fù le
piān yuǎn dì qū yóu yú yě néng shǐ yòng yí dòng zhī fù le wǎng luò fù gài bù duàn kuò dà
yóu yú piān yuǎn dì qū yě néng shǐ yòng yí dòng zhī fù le wǎng luò fù gài bù duàn kuò dà

grammar_points.meaning: Exactly, after all, in the end
grammar_points.explanation: 究竟 has two distinct roles depending on whether it appears in a question or a statement. Structure: Subject + 究竟 + [question word]？(questions) | Subject + 究竟 + [statement] (statements). 究竟 in questions adds emphasis and urgency, pressing for a clear answer (exactly what, who, or how). In statements, 究竟 means 'after all' or 'in the end' — summing up a conclusion.

examples.pinyin: Nǐ jiū jìng xiǎng yào shén me?

examples.chinese: 这件事究竟是谁的责任，大家都不清楚。
examples.pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì jiū jìng shì shuí de zé rèn，dà jiā dōu bù qīng chǔ.
examples.english: Who exactly is responsible for this matter is unclear to everyone.

exercises.question: Choose the best completion: 他___为什么不来参加会议，没有人知道。
究竟 is used to:
choices: Emphasize the desire to find the true answer

exercises.question: Which sentence uses 究竟 correctly?
choices: 这个问题究竟有没有答案，很难说。
究竟因为他很忙，所以没来。
她究竟去了北京所以很开心。

exercises.question: In the sentence 这究竟是谁的错, 究竟 means:
Fill in: 你___要去还是不去，请给我一个明确的回答。

mini_exercises.question: 究竟 has two main uses:
mini_exercises.correct: In questions it adds emphasis demanding a clear answer ('exactly what…?'); in statements it means 'after all' to acknowledge a fundamental truth
options: In questions it adds emphasis demanding a clear answer ('exactly what…?'); in statements it means 'after all' to acknowledge a fundamental truth
It is used only in questions to politely express uncertainty
It always introduces a surprising or unexpected result
It indicates that something is happening gradually over time

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: Exactly what value can this platform bring to users?
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 这个平台___能为用户带来什么价值？
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 这个平台___能为用户带来什么价值？
mini_exercises.question_english: Exactly what value can this platform bring to users?

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 究竟?
mini_exercises.correct: 数字经济究竟对传统商业有多大的冲击？
options: 数字经济究竟对传统商业有多大的冲击？
数字经济对传统商业有多大的冲击，究竟？
究竟数字经济对传统商业，有多大的冲击？
数字经济对究竟传统商业有多大的冲击？
option_pinyin: shù zì jīng jì jiū jìng duì chuán tǒng shāng yè yǒu duō dà de chōng jī
shù zì jīng jì duì chuán tǒng shāng yè yǒu duō dà de chōng jī jiū jìng
jiū jìng shù zì jīng jì duì chuán tǒng shāng yè yǒu duō dà de chōng jī
shù zì jīng jì duì jiū jìng chuán tǒng shāng yè yǒu duō dà de chōng jī

culture_notes.title: China's Four Great Inventions and the Digital Age
culture_notes.title_chinese: 中国古代四大发明与数字时代
culture_notes.content:
Ancient China gave the world four transformative inventions: papermaking (造纸术 zào zhǐ shù), printing (印刷术 yìn shuā shù), gunpowder (火药 huǒ yào), and the compass (指南针 zhǐ nán zhēn). These innovations fundamentally shaped human civilization and spread across the world via the Silk Road.

Today, many observers draw a parallel to a 'new four great inventions' (新四大发明) attributed to modern China: high-speed rail (高铁 gāotiě), mobile payment (移动支付 yídòng zhīfù), online shopping (网购 wǎnggòu), and shared bikes (共享单车 gòngxiǎng dānchē). These innovations, while not exclusively Chinese in origin, have been developed and scaled in China at an unprecedented pace.

Mobile payment in particular — powered by platforms like WeChat Pay (微信支付) and Alipay (支付宝 Zhīfùbǎo) — has transformed daily life in Chinese cities to a degree unmatched elsewhere. Smartphone payments are used for everything from street food vendors to luxury goods. This seamless integration of technology into daily commerce reflects both China's rapid urbanization and a culture of practical innovation.

quiz.question: 不仅…而且 is used to:
choices: Add a further point extending the first

quiz.question: Choose the correct sentence using 由于:
choices: 由于工作繁忙，他没时间锻炼。
由于他很聪明，但是没有通过考试。
由于她去了，所以因此她回来了。

quiz.question: What does 究竟 add to a question?
What are the 'new four great inventions' of modern China?
choices: High-speed rail, mobile payment, online shopping, shared bikes

quiz.question: Fill in: 这款应用___使用方便，___价格低廉。

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 兰特，你现在回欧洲了，在意大利还继续用微信吗？
lines.pinyin: Lán tè, nǐ xiàn zài zài huí ōu zhōu le, zài yì dà lì hái jì xù yòng Wēi xìn ma?
lines.english: Elena, You have been back to Europe, do you still continue to use WeChat in Italy now?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 当然用！它不仅能联系我在中国的朋友，而且可以看很多中国的新闻和其他中文内容。
lines.pinyin: Dāng rán yòng! Tā bù jǐn néng lián xì jiā rén, ér qiě kě yǐ kàn hěn duō zhōng guó de xīn wén hé qí tā zhōng wén nèi róng.
lines.english: Of course! It can not only keep in touch with family, but also access to Chinese news and other other Chinese contents .

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 由于语言文化不同，你觉得很多使用微信的外国人究竟能不能真正融入中文平台呢？
lines.pinyin: Yóu yú yǔ yán wén huà bù tóng, hěn duō shǐ yòng wēi xìn de wài guó rén jiū jìng néng bù néng zhēn zhèng róng rù zhōng wén píng tái ne?
lines.english: Due to language and cuture differences, Do you think the foreigners who's using wechat can truly integrate into Chinese platforms after all?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我觉得这正是跨文化交流的魅力所在 —— 我们都在学习彼此的表达方式。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ jué de zhè zhèng shì kuà wén huà jiāo liú de mèi lì suǒ zài — wǒ men dōu zài xué xí bǐ cǐ de biǎo dá fāng shì.
lines.english: I think this is precisely the charm of cross-cultural exchange — we are all learning each other's ways of expression.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 说得也对。数字平台正在慢慢创造一种新的全球文化认同。
lines.pinyin: Shuō de yě duì. Shù zì píng tái zhèng zài màn màn chuàng zào yī zhǒng xīn de quán qiú wén huà rèn tóng.
lines.english: Well said. Digital platforms are slowly creating a new global cultural identity.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我上次去上海，几乎所有地方都能移动支付，真的太方便了！
lines.pinyin: Wǒ shàng cì qù Shàng hǎi, jī hū suǒ yǒu dì fāng dōu néng yí dòng zhī fù, zhēn de tài fāng biàn le!
lines.english: Last time I went to Shanghai, almost everywhere accepted mobile payment — it was so convenient!

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 对，由于移动支付的普及，很多地方甚至已经不接受现金了，他们没有那么多小额现金找零。
lines.pinyin: Duì, yóu yú yí dòng zhī fù de pǔ jí, hěn duō dì fāng shèn zhì yǐ jīng bú jiē shòu xiàn jīn le，tā men méi yǒu nà me duō xiǎo é xiàn jīn zhǎo líng。
lines.english: Right, due to the widespread adoption of mobile payment, many places no longer even accept cash， They don't have that many small amounts of cash to give change。

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 这对外国游客来说究竟是便利还是障碍呢？
lines.pinyin: Zhè duì wài guó yóu kè lái shuō jiū jìng shì biàn lì hái shì zhàng ài ne?
lines.english: For foreign tourists, is this exactly convenient or a barrier?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 确实是个问题。不仅外国人不习惯，而且有些老年人也觉得困难。
lines.pinyin: Quē shí shì gè wèn tí. Bù jǐn wài guó rén bù xí guàn, ér qiě yǒu xiē lǎo nián rén yě jué de kùn nan.
lines.english: It is indeed a problem. Not only are foreigners unfamiliar with it, but some elderly people also find it difficult.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 所以创新也需要考虑到所有用户的体验，这才是真正的对用户友好。
lines.pinyin: Suǒ yǐ chuàng xīn yě xū yào kǎo lǜ dào suǒ yǒu yòng hù de tǐ yàn, zhè cái shì zhēn zhèng de duì yòng hù yǒu hǎo.
lines.english: So innovation also needs to consider the experience of all users — that is what true user-friendliness means.
